claim_limit: No 40-block cover was found and no 40-block family was excluded. The result demotes only this fixed six-defect warm-start basin under the recorded stochastic indecomposable three-block proposal and annealing policy.
hypothesis: Twenty fixed-seed indecomposable three-block point-degree-preserving ejection searches improve the six-defect warm start to at most five uncovered quadruples, or find a 40-block cover.

search_efficiency.mechanism: Choose an uncovered quadruple and one of its 28 containing blocks, then derive the remaining two additions through an exact aggregate point-incidence pair-signature bucket; score only nonzero incremental deltas.
search_efficiency.measured_quad_counter_ratio: 495/68.23252 = 7.2546 mean reduction against a full four-set rescore
search_efficiency.soundness: The independent checker reconstructed all 17,999 accepted moves, verified exact point-incidence preservation and absence of a legal two-block subtrade, replayed the hash chains, and recomputed final candidates. Sampling remains non-exhaustive.

controls.positive: The pinned 41-block cover hash 395bc870e7eb9e84a472873db97de553afc34afdb666545824944e89047913e5 covered all 495 quadruples.
controls.negative: Deleting its lexicographically first block produced 10 uncovered quadruples.
controls.regression: The two route-specific unit tests passed. The full 57-test repository run had 43 passes, 2 pre-existing stale-count failures, and 12 environment/missing-artifact errors (chiefly absent pysat and a missing catalog-5 CNF); none involved the three-block producer or checker.

route_decision.reason: The predeclared at-most-five signal failed in every seed despite 17,999 independently replayed basin-crossing moves. Repeating the same proposal distribution or increasing the same temperature is low-information.
route_decision.reopen_condition: A materially different state generator, such as temporary point-degree slack with a checked exact-degree projection, or an exhaustive direct three-block-neighborhood classifier that proves a new local structural fact.
route_decision.next_objective: Test temporary point-degree slack rather than another exact-degree three-block annealing tranche.
route_decision.first_action: Implement a bounded remove-three/add-three proposal that may deviate from degree 20 by at most two in L1 distance and requires exact-degree return within a fixed short ejection chain; screen the same 20 frozen seeds at 10,000 scored proposals with direct final validation.
route_decision.stop_condition: Stop this successor route unless it reaches at most five uncovered quadruples with exact final point degrees, or yields a separately checked structural classification.

tool_disclosure: GPT-5.6 Sol principal designed and audited the pass; a GPT-5.6 Terra delegate supplied advisory reconnaissance. Deterministic Python 3.12.3 generated and checked the screen. No SAT solver, CAS, or proof assistant was used in this epoch.
